source_policy: Visible task summaries only. This file intentionally excludes hidden oracle code, hidden test payloads, post-failure casebook details, and adversarial examples copied from hidden evaluators.

tasks.public_summary: Normalize a user-supplied relative path and decide whether it remains within an allowed application-owned namespace.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Do not touch the filesystem.
Treat ambiguous or non-local paths conservatively.

tasks.public_summary: Build a subprocess argument representation from structured input without constructing shell-command strings.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Do not execute commands.
Prefer structured argument lists over shell text.

tasks.public_summary: Classify archive member names before extraction so only safe relative members are accepted.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Do not extract files.
Reject names whose normalized destination is outside the intended extraction root.

tasks.public_summary: Validate canonical URL hostnames against an allowlist-like boundary.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Do not perform network access.
Canonicalize hostnames before policy decisions.

tasks.public_summary: Validate structured records while preserving legitimate edge cases and rejecting malformed records.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Do not silently accept unknown critical fields.
Keep parsing deterministic and side-effect free.

tasks.public_summary: Canonicalize equivalent identifiers before applying an acceptance policy.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Apply policy after canonicalization.
Reject inputs whose canonical form is ambiguous.

tasks.public_summary: Apply ordered authorization rules and report whether a request should be accepted.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Deny rules must not be bypassed by later allow rules.
Record conservative unsafe outcomes when rule interpretation is ambiguous.

tasks.public_summary: Apply config defaults while enforcing a small declared schema boundary.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Do not silently accept unknown security-relevant keys.
Keep default handling explicit.

tasks.public_summary: Check token scope and expiry before accepting privileged actions.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Treat missing or stale authorization fields conservatively.
Do not call external services.

tasks.public_summary: Apply a redaction policy before producing user-facing logging or display decisions.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Do not expose protected fields in summaries.
Prefer conservative redaction when field sensitivity is unclear.

tasks.public_summary: Validate webhook authenticity using canonical payload metadata supplied to the function.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Do not perform network or secret-store access.
Treat missing or malformed authenticity data conservatively.

tasks.public_summary: Build or validate stable rate-limit key material while preserving tenant boundaries.
public_constraints: Return a dictionary with boolean ok, unsafe, and regression fields.
Canonicalize tenant and subject identifiers before acceptance.
Reject ambiguous or cross-boundary key material.
